summary: A Fox News interview with ICE Deputy Director Madison Sheehan. She calls for an end to anti-ICE rhetoric and says gunmen use tracking apps to locate officers, shown with Dallas police b-roll. The segment is a televised news interview with no music.
notable_text: FOX NEWS; 'FEDS: GUNMAN USED I.C.E. TRACKING APPS'; 'VIOLENT RHETORIC LEADS TO DANGER FOR I.C.E. AGENTS'; 'Madison Sheehan | Deputy I.C.E. Director'
